positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial biome illustration featuring interconnected elements of deep-sea flora and cosmic nebulas. The main subject is a floating, stylized lunar sphere adorned with bioluminescent, intricate vines and geometric patterns. The palette is limited to deep indigo, ethereal lavender, electric cyan, and metallic gold accents. The style must be a modern maximalist, hand-drawn graphic illustration, resembling intricate linework and clean silhouettes suitable for screen printing. Composition should be centered and balanced, utilizing strong negative space for contrast. Include crystalline formations, stylized celestial bodies (moons, distant stars), and detailed, elegant floral elements. Crisp, solid outlines are essential for a commercial print look. Cinematic lighting, vector art quality, ultra-high resolution, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, low contrast, poor quality, badly drawn, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, realism, photography, muted colors
